name: World War II
description: The deadliest conflict in human history, involving the vast majority of the world's countries.

name: World War I
description: One of the deadliest conflicts in history, leading to major political changes and empires collapsing.

name: Vietnam War
description: A major Cold War-era conflict fought in Vietnam, Laos, and Cambodia.

name: Korean War
description: Fought between North and South Korea, which quickly escalated to include international superpowers.

name: Napoleonic Wars
description: A series of major conflicts pitting the French Empire against opposing coalitions.

name: American Civil War
description: Fought between the Northern states and Southern states over slavery and states' rights.

name: Thirty Years' War
description: One of the longest and most destructive conflicts in European history, starting as a religious war.

name: The Crusades
description: A series of religious wars initiated, supported, and directed by the Latin Church in the medieval period.
